title: Bitter Light Jamaican Refried Beans Stir-fry
description: A light and high-protein-friendly dish featuring slow-cooked bitter refried beans with a touch of lime juice to brighten the flavor, perfect for a sick-day meal.
instructions: In a large pot, combine refried beans with garlic and onion. Add enough water to cover the ingredients.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for about 20 minutes until liquid is mostly absorbed.
Mix in lime juice and stir well to ensure it's evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
Season with salt to taste, if needed. Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
